category_sources: source_facts.description says resterm is a terminal client for .http/.rest files with HTTP, GraphQL, and gRPC support.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository, whose README is the primary documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/unkn0wn-root/resterm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.

source_facts.executables lists resterm and current_curation.tags includes cli.
